title: 🧠 Chaos Logic Paradoxes
name: Chaos Logic Paradoxes
what_it_is: Paradoxical or contradictory truths emerging from chaotic systems—where logic breaks down or loops into itself (e.g., liar’s paradox, self-erasing truths).
how_to_use: her sigils embody paradox—glyphs that erase themselves while still casting effects
his aura speaks paradox—truths loop and contradict in recursive glow
animation_behavior: Glyphs appear and cancel, meaning loops, animation undoes itself as it progresses ---
